title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Infosys Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Infosys Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Infosys Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Infosys Advisory Limited:
Infosys Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys Advisory Limited!
